list.name: asset
list.label: Asset
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT asset FROM pca_signals ORDER BY asset

panels.title: Total Signals
panels.description: Total PCA signals detected in time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as "Signals" FROM pca_signals WHERE timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000
SELECT COUNT(*) as "Long" FROM pca_signals WHERE direction = 'long' AND timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

SELECT COUNT(*) as "Short" FROM pca_signals WHERE direction = 'short' AND timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

panels.title: Signal Accuracy
panels.description: % of resolved signals where z-score moved toward zero

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ABS(exit_z_score) < ABS(z_score)) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as "Accuracy" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

SELECT ROUND(AVG(hold_time_ms) / 60000, 1) as "Hold Time" FROM pca_signals WHERE resolved = true AND timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000

panels.title: Variance Explained
panels.description: Latest factor model variance explained by PC1+PC2

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((variance_explained[array_length(variance_explained, 1)] * 100)::numeric, 1) as "Variance" FROM pca_factor_models ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000) as time, asset, z_score FROM pca_residuals WHERE timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000) as time, asset, residual * 10000 as "Residual (bps)" FROM pca_residuals WHERE timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000) as "Time", asset as "Asset", direction as "Direction", ROUND(z_score::numeric, 2) as "Entry Z", ROUND(exit_z_score::numeric, 2) as "Exit Z", ROUND((hold_time_ms / 60000)::numeric, 1) as "Hold (min)", CASE WHEN resolved THEN 'Closed' ELSE 'Open' END as "Status", ROUND((residual * 10000)::numeric, 2) as "Residual (bps)", ROUND((pc1_return * 10000)::numeric, 2) as "PC1 (bps)" FROM pca_signals WHERE timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT asset as "Asset", COUNT(*) as "Count" FROM pca_signals WHERE timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 GROUP BY asset ORDER BY "Count" DESC

SELECT direction as "Direction", COUNT(*) as "Count" FROM pca_signals WHERE timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 GROUP BY direction
SELECT asset, direction, total_signals, resolved_signals, avg_hold_min, avg_entry_zscore, avg_exit_zscore, correct_direction, accuracy_pct FROM v_pca_signal_performance

panels.title: Latest Factor Loadings (PC1)
panels.description: Current PC1 loadings for each asset - represents market sensitivity

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_timestamp(timestamp / 1000) as "Model Time", num_factors as "Factors", ROUND((variance_explained[1] * 100)::numeric, 1) as "PC1 Var %", ROUND((variance_explained[2] * 100)::numeric, 1) as "PC2 Var %", pc1_loadings as "PC1 Loadings" FROM pca_factor_models ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5
